name: White Cloud Inn Baked Nut Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chopped nuts (walnuts and Cashews), finely chopped
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 375°F. In a large bowl, sauté onion and celery in oil until tender. Mix all ingredients thoroughly in a greased 11-3/4" x 7-1/2" baking dish. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes or until firm and lightly browned on top. Serve with your favorite sauce or gravy. The inn uses a mushroom sauce, but the dish is also good with tomato sauce or onion gravy. Yield: 5 to 6 servings.
